Vulnerabilities.Title: HTTP/2 Rapid Reset attack
Vulnerabilities.Description: The HTTP/2 protocol allows denial of service through stream cancellation that resets many streams quickly.

Vulnerabilities.Title: follow-redirects leaks authorization header on cross-origin redirect
Vulnerabilities.Description: Versions of follow-redirects before 1.15.6 leak the Authorization header to third parties on cross-origin redirects.

Vulnerabilities.Title: Express open redirect on unsanitized URL
Vulnerabilities.Description: Versions of Express before 4.19.2 are vulnerable to open redirect through unsanitized URLs passed to res.redirect().
